changeSet.author: system

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ziliaogoumai WHERE dingdanhao LIKE 'ZL2026%'

changeSet.sql:
SET NAMES utf8mb4;
INSERT INTO ziliaogoumai (addtime, dingdanhao, xuexiziliaoid, ziliaobiaoti, jiage, yonghuzhanghao, yonghuxingming, zhuangtai, zhifufangshi) VALUES ('2026-04-20 10:30:00', 'ZL20260420001', 1, 'UI原型快速设计', 10, 'wanghao', '王浩', '已支付', '微信支付'), ('2026-04-21 14:00:00', 'ZL20260421001', 2, 'Python自动化脚本编写', 20, 'wanghao', '王浩', '已支付', '支付宝'), ('2026-04-22 09:15:00', 'ZL20260422001', 5, '职场压力管理', 30, 'zhangqiang', '张强', '已支付', '微信支付'), ('2026-04-23 16:00:00', 'ZL20260423001', 7, '财务报表解读', 25, 'chenxi', '陈曦', '已支付', '支付宝'), ('2026-04-24 11:30:00', 'ZL20260424001', 4, '市场竞品分析', 15, 'lina', '李娜', '已支付', '微信支付'), ('2026-04-25 08:45:00', 'ZL20260425001', 8, '供应链库存优化', 10, 'zhoukai', '周凯', '已支付', '支付宝'), ('2026-04-26 13:20:00', 'ZL20260426001', 2, 'Python自动化脚本编写', 20, 'liumin', '刘敏', '已支付', '微信支付'), ('2026-04-27 15:00:00', 'ZL20260427001', 1, 'UI原型快速设计', 10, 'wufang', '吴芳', '待支付', '支付宝');
